response.overview: Ana, a young Filipina filmmaker, shoots a re-enactment of a fight she once had with her mother. Embodying cultural pressure from her mother to work beyond her limits for the sake of perfection, Ana rewrites every painful exchange into a perfect one.
response.tagline: Ana, a young Filipina filmmaker, shoots a re-enactment of a fight she once had with her mother.
response.title: Desync
